ddls:
CREATE TABLE "building_managers" (
  "building_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building manager */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the building manager */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the user is managing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_building_managers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water sample */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the sample was collected from */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., first draw, flushing) */,
  "lead_result" REAL /* Lead level in the sample (ppb) */,
  "copper_result" REAL /* Copper level in the sample (ppm) */,
  "sample_status" TEXT /* Status of the sample (e.g., pending, completed, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retest_results" (
  "retest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retest result */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being retested */,
  "retest_date" TEXT /* Date the retest was performed */,
  "lead_result" REAL /* Lead level in the retest sample (ppb) */,
  "copper_result" REAL /* Copper level in the retest sample (ppm) */,
  "retest_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the retest (e.g., initial result was invalid, sample was contaminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retest_results_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES water_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, building manager, laboratory personnel) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratory_results" (
  "lab_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory result */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being tested */,
  "lab_date" TEXT /* Date the laboratory result was received */,
  "lead_result" REAL /* Lead level in the laboratory result (ppb) */,
  "copper_result" REAL /* Copper level in the laboratory result (ppm) */,
  "lab_status" TEXT /* Status of the laboratory result (e.g., pending, completed, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laboratory_results_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES water_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratories" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory */,
  "lab_address" TEXT /* Address of the laboratory */,
  "lab_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the laboratory */,
  "lab_email" TEXT /* Email address of the laboratory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_sample_tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory sample being tracked */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being tracked */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory performing the test */,
  "tracking_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was received by the laboratory */,
  "tracking_status" TEXT /* Status of the sample (e.g., received, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_sample_tracking_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES water_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_sample_tracking_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Text of the notification message */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., lead exceedance, copper exceedance, general notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the notification related to the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., pending, completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_notification_id FOREIGN KEY ("notification_id") REFERENCES notifications ("notification_id")
)
